title: Sizechange
description: This Datapack add some totems and shields that when held make you big or small, and they are expensive.
body:
# SizeChange

Current minecraft version: 26.1.2

## Required Texturepack

This texturepack is required to have the datapack operational, well you don't need it but all the custom totems will be purple and black cubes.

Texturepack: [Click to download texturepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bSPQ4dVT/versions/ZteTfd0k/SizeChange%20Texturepack.zip)
  
# Features

## Usage

By putting any of the custom items this datapack provides in your hand/offhand you can change size, and by hiding it in your inventory you become normal sized again.

## Sizes

### Small

![Crafting recepie for Totem of small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fab8203593e1cce1b8ac3ba870d13b9790136b04.png)

Crafted like this it makes you 2 times smaller and almost everything is worse but you can mine faster. Specifically you can mine deepslate with an efficiency 5 diamond pickaxe whitout any beacons. 
You can also use redstone or lapis instad of emeralds.

### Big

![Crafting recepie for Totem of big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ce19d21124deb0608b26e8fae7089a1c8c5cbd6.png)

Crafted like this it makes you 2 times bigger but it also makes it almost impossible to mine anyhing.
You can also use redstone blocks or lapis blocks instad of emerald blocks.

### Huge

![Crafting recepie for Totem of huge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5258a2258732734e2434cf0204899aca9a4860e9.png)

Crafted like this it makes you 4 times bigger but it also makes it literally impossible to mine anyhing. (acctually it is not but it will take a year to break anything)

## Materials

### Totems

You can use totems in the crafting recepies as you can see above.

### Shields

You can use shields in the same crafting recepies as above just replace the totem with a shield. (It will remove the banner pattern if there is one)
There is one catch thou, the shield will get curse of vanishing on it. So you will lose it when you die. But as a bonus the shield is now unbrakable.

### Breakable Shields

You can use a shield in one of the crafting recepies below to make the shield whitout curse of vanishing and whitout the shield being unbrakable.

Small:

![Crafting recepie for Breakable Shield of small](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2be7e3a825652fac4b7e87e44dd9222645289945.png)

Big:

![Crafting recepie for Breakable Shield of big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fab2dc418eb1b112f73c5f073a571c237d6a9bf.png)

Huge:

![Crafting recepie for Breakable Shield of Hige](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3520808a0e2ee13883083948a7e760632949ecbc.png)

Huge totem texture by: [tinytransfem](https://modrinth.com/user/tinytransfem)
